title: 軽い言葉じゃ意味がねえ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an interview broadcast on TV, Inari One
declares that her next race goal is the Japan Dirt
Derby. The general response is one of surprise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reporters descend on Oi to interview Chief, Inari
One's old trainer before she transferred to Tracen
Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Chief, not knowing Inari One's ultimate goal or
the reason she wants to dominate the regionals,
becomes furious upon hearing the news.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though I want to clear things up with him, Inari
One insists we let the issue lie and that she'll
prove her determination through her results. Still,
I can't help but worry about leaving the
misunderstanding between them.
